semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for validating the LLM command's user interface and configuration surface.
responsibilities: Validates that the LLM command rejects internal compatibility keys during 'set' operations.
Verifies that the LLM status command prints provider and model information to the console.
outOfScope: Integration or end-to-end testing of the LLM command.
Testing of LLM API call execution or response handling.
Validation of configuration persistence or storage layer.
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide automated regression coverage for the LLM command's CLI surface, ensuring configuration validation and status display work correctly.

publicSurface: it('rejects internal compatibility keys from llm set usage', ...)
it('prints provider and model info from llm status', ...)

English.role: Vitest unit test suite for validating the LLM command's user interface and configuration surface.
responsibilities: Validates that the LLM command rejects internal compatibility keys during 'set' operations.
Verifies that the LLM status command prints provider and model information to the console.
outOfScope: Integration or end-to-end testing of the LLM command.
Testing of LLM API call execution or response handling.
Validation of configuration persistence or storage layer.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于验证 LLM 命令用户界面和配置表面的 Vitest 单元测试套件。
responsibilities: 验证 LLM 命令在 'set' 操作期间拒绝内部兼容性键。
确认 LLM 状态命令将提供商和模型信息打印到控制台。
outOfScope: LLM 命令的集成或端到端测试。
LLM API 调用执行或响应处理的测试。
配置持久化或存储层的验证。
